_comment: Setup input. Edit this file, then run setup.bat/sh.
All paths (except projectRoot) are relative to the PROJECT ROOT.
projectRoot itself is relative to this tool directory.
After setup, discard changes to this file: git checkout -- .
To use a preset: copy it over this file, adjust projectRoot, run setup.
_projectRoot_comment: Relative path from this tool directory to your project root. e.g. '../..' if tool is at MyProject/tools/ConfigTool/
_projectConfigPath_comment: Where to generate the runtime config file (relative to project root).
_excelPath_comment: Directory containing your .xlsx data tables (relative to project root).
_enumPath_comment: Subdirectory under excelPath for enum .xlsx files.
_outputPaths_comment: Output directories (relative to project root). Only paths for enabled generators matter.
_generators_comment: Toggle each output type. Disable what you don't need.
_codeGeneration_comment: language: 'csharp' or 'typescript'. namespace: required for C#, leave empty for TS.
